span_mappings.nl_span: the T-step is matrix-vector multiplication by the Fibonacci matrix

formal_statement:
theorem fib_mat_action :
    ∀ b e : ZMod 9,
    Matrix.mulVec fib_mat ![b, e] = ![b + e, b]
natural_language_claim: The QA T-step is matrix-vector multiplication by the Fibonacci matrix: for all b, e ∈ ZMod 9, F · [b, e]ᵀ = [b+e, b]ᵀ.
